honesty_boundary: This is a paper-derived traversal subworkload, not full RTXRMQ. Full RTXRMQ needs a closest-hit/argmin result carrying the hit element id/value; RTDL v0.9 exposes ray_triangle_hit_count but not a public ray_triangle_closest_hit primitive.

paper.title: Accelerating Range Minimum Queries with Ray Tracing Cores

rtdl_supported_workload.description: One YZ-aligned triangle per array element and one +X ray per query range. The returned hit_count is the number of values in [l,r] at or below a threshold.
rtdl_supported_workload.name: rtxrmq_range_threshold_hitcount_analogue
